# Valid minimal spec

## Set the scene

Smallest possible valid spec. One frame, no Mermaid, no open questions.

## Main flow

### Frame: Home
key: home

Scene: User sees the home screen.

```ascii
┌──────────┐
│  Home    │
│          │
│  Hello   │
└──────────┘
```

**Notes:**
- This is the only frame
